text:
(Admission) : Mech Alt Diet CHAR 1 This column documents whether the patient needed a mechanically altered diet as their nutritional approach at the time of admission. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
529 ALTRD_DIET_7_DAY_CD ALTRD_DIET_7_DAY_CD Nutritional Approaches (7 days): Mech Alt Diet CHAR 1 This column documents whether the patient has needed a mechanically altered diet as their nutritional approach in the past seven days. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No
